ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Geographical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_type" INTEGER /* Type of sensor (e.g., Wind Speed, Temperature) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the next maintenance */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "property" TEXT /* Type of property measured (e.g., PeakWindSpeed) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., milesPerHour) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "data_validity" TEXT /* Indicates if the data is valid or flagged for quality issues */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag data that has been marked for quality issues (e.g., 0 for no issues, 1 for issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor takes measurements */,
  "data_retention_period" TEXT /* Period for which data is retained */,
  "last_calibration_procedure" TEXT /* Last calibration procedure used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sensor that the alert applies to */,
  "property" TEXT /* Property that the alert monitors */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, acknowledged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality record */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sensor associated with the data */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp associated with the quality assessment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (scale from 1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the data quality */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who assessed the data quality */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "reassessment_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a reassessment is required (e.g., 0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
